body:
### User Story
As a user, I want the taskbar clock to display time in a 24-hour (military) format without an AM/PM indicator to improve readability and match my preference.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The taskbar clock uses 24-hour format (e.g., 19:00 for 7:00 PM).
- [ ] The AM/PM indicator is removed from the taskbar display.
- [ ] Ensure consistent padding (e.g., "07:00" for 7:00 AM).
title: [Feature]: Change taskbar clock to 24-hour (military) format
